items.title: Game ball has to go to Nia Coffey who kept the #Lynx in it during a rough 1st half. Led with team-high 22 points and +7 ✨
items.author: Leo S
items.body_excerpt:
Game ball has to go to Nia Coffey who kept the #Lynx in it during a rough 1st half. Led with team-high 22 points and +7 ✨

Big shoutout to Kayla McBride (17p, 3r, 3a) & Courtney Williams (21p, 12r, 5a), though you have to mention Ola Kosu (4p, 6r, 2s, 2b) who stepped up with Howard in foul trouble

items.title: Random goalkeeper in WC game had a good game and went from 50k to 14.5 million followers. Wemby has 6.2 million. Does this show how basketball is not as global as some here think it is?
items.author: mbdtf95
items.body_excerpt: Was actually surprised to see Wemby has just 6.2 million. He comes from a country of 70 million people and he has been in spotlight for a long time. 6.2 million is what some half promising youngster playing in Paris Saint Germain would get. Best french player Mbappe has 131…

items.title: Teams keep working to throw different coverages at Olivia Miles. Keeps having the patience to poke at them. Stokes at the level and hits, keeps attacking to get around it. Re-sets and fires to the corner for a 3.
items.author: Steve Jones
items.body_excerpt: Teams keep working to throw different coverages at Olivia Miles. Keeps having the patience to poke at them. Stokes at the level and hits, keeps attacking to get around it. Re-sets and fires to the corner for a 3.
